/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -g -Os -ldl -fPIC -pthread -rdynamic -finline-functions -Wshadow -Wcast-align -Wfatal-errors -Wpointer-arith -Wredundant-decls -Wunreachable-code -Wreturn-local-addr -Woverloaded-virtual -fno-omit-frame-pointer -Wunused-but-set-variable -Wsizeof-pointer-memaccess -Wno-dangling-else -Wno-unused-local-typedefs -Wtrampolines -Wdouble-promotion -Wsized-deallocation -Wvector-operation-performance -Wshift-overflow=2 -Wduplicated-cond -Wnull-dereference -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/db_data.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/db_data.dir/tcbdatadb.cpp.o -o ../../bin/db_data   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib64  -L/home/kviolet/software/akviolet/tinyToolkit/lib64  -L/home/kviolet/software/android/akviolet/tinyToolkit/lib64  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/usr/local/lib64:/home/kviolet/software/akviolet/tinyToolkit/lib64:/home/kviolet/software/android/akviolet/tinyToolkit/lib64 -ltokyocabinet -lbz2 -lz
